scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w apps/api" "npm run dev -w apps/web" "npm run dev -w apps/video-worker"
scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/video-worker && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w apps/api && npm run lint -w apps/video-worker && npm run lint -w apps/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w apps/api && npm run typecheck -w apps/video-worker && npm run typecheck -w apps/web
